Engineering Projects

Industry and research portfolio demonstrating end-to-end mechanical design leadership, heavy equipment development, hydraulic systems integration, and experimental aero-hydrodynamic research.

Industrial Research Marine Aerospace
---
01

Geotechnical Drill Machine R011

End-to-end design and delivery of custom geotechnical drilling rig with improved stability, serviceability, and operational capability.

Industrial

Key Contributions

  • Led mechanical design of folding mast with custom hinge solution, rotating stabilizer legs and control console.
  • Reduced centre of gravity through machine layout optimisation.
  • Redesigned foot clamp and breakout assembly integrating custom hydraulic cylinders.
  • Redesigned rubber track mounting using standard PFC profiles to reduce weight and fabrication cost.
  • Converted mast travel mechanism from timing belt to leaf chain system for improved durability.
  • Designed drill rod storage and mud pump mounting systems.
  • Performed hydraulic component selection, pipework routing, and sizing calculations.
  • Developed automated BOM extraction tool (Solid Edge → Google Sheets).
  • Delivered DFM-optimised fabrication drawings with GD&T.
  • Managed supplier engagement, cost negotiation, and manufacturing delivery.
  • Prepared commissioning documentation and operator manuals.

Outcomes

  • Successful design, manufacture, and delivery meeting all client requirements.
  • Improved machine packaging, reliability, and serviceability.
  • Reliable and stable engine and hydraulic system performance.
---
02

Geotechnical Drill Machine R010 — Solomon Islands Deployment

Design modifications to improve reliability, serviceability, and packaging for offshore deployment.

Industrial

Key Contributions

  • Redesigned energy chain system improving durability and operational reliability.
  • Relocated wireline winch to eliminate rope interference risk.
  • Converted hydraulic system to hard pipework for improved packaging and robustness.
  • Redesigned hydraulic filter mounting for maintainability.
  • Conducted operational simulation and performance validation.
  • Prepared manufacturing and fabrication drawings.
  • Coordinated suppliers.
  • Prepared user manual and commissioning checklists.

Outcomes

  • Successful offshore deployment.
  • Improved reliability, maintainability, and hydraulic layout efficiency.
---
03

Geotechnical Drill Machine R009 — Truck-Mounted Variant

Custom drill machine integrated on a truck for convenient transportation across all terrains.

Industrial

Key Contributions

  • Designed safety spin cage supporting H&S compliance.
  • Developed mechanical throttle push-pull system.
  • Designed drivetrain shaft transmitting torque from drivehead motor to gearbox.
  • Conducted operational simulation and performance validation.
  • Produced detailed technical and fabrication drawings.
  • Coordinated suppliers.
  • Prepared user manual and commissioning checklists.

Outcomes

  • Reliable truck-mounted drilling solution enabling improved field mobility.
---
04

Geotechnical Drill Machine R008 — CPT Hybrid Rig

Custom dual-function rig operating as a standard drill machine and performing cone penetration testing (CPT).

Industrial

Key Contributions

  • Led mechanical design of CPT assembly integrating translational and rotational motion.
  • Converted drivehead travel to long-stroke hydraulic cylinder system.
  • Designed vertical energy chain system for hose management.
  • Designed electronic throttle control system.
  • Designed foot clamp and breakout assembly.
  • Designed wireline winch assembly.
  • Designed drivetrain shaft transmitting torque from drivehead motor to gearbox.
  • Conducted operational simulation and performance validation.
  • Produced detailed technical and fabrication drawings.
  • Coordinated suppliers.
  • Prepared user manual and commissioning checklists.

Outcomes

  • Successful delivery of multifunction drilling and CPT platform.
  • Reliable hydraulic and mechanical system performance.
---
05

Excavator-Mounted Drill System R007

Custom drill machine designed as an attachment for excavator-based deployment.

Industrial

Key Contributions

  • Redesigned foot clamp and breakout assembly.
  • Converted mast travel mechanism from timing belt to leaf chain system for improved durability.
  • Conducted operational simulation and performance validation.
  • Produced detailed technical and fabrication drawings.
  • Coordinated suppliers.
  • Prepared user manual and commissioning checklists.

Outcomes

  • Successful deployment of excavator-mounted drilling attachment.
---
06

Wind Gust Simulation Rig for UAV Testing — PhD Research Lead

Investigation of small fixed-wing UAV performance under turbulent flows, wind gusts, and natural wind conditions.

Aerospace Research

Key Contributions

  • Designed oscillating rig and passive grid to generate turbulent and gust flow.
  • Conducted wind tunnel testing of fixed-wing UAV platforms.
  • Implemented instrumentation and data acquisition systems.
  • Developed predictive mathematical performance model.
  • Produced technical and fabrication drawings.

Outcomes

  • Identification of UAV performance limitations under extreme wind conditions.
  • Development of predictive model supporting UAV control design.
  • PhD-level research outcomes.
---
07

Tidal Turbine Performance Investigation — MEng Research

Experimental and numerical investigation of stream tidal turbine performance under extreme flow conditions.

Marine Research

Key Contributions

  • Designed waterproof tidal turbine model with high theoretical efficiency.
  • Conducted flume experimentation and data analysis.
  • Performed numerical simulation and validation.
  • Delivered technical and fabrication drawings.

Outcomes

  • Experimental and numerical validation of turbine performance.
  • Master’s research with journal publication.
